data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of distinguishing between required and optional fields in the intake form. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm the implementation of this requirement, as it only describes the functionality of the intake form without detailing which fields are required or optional. This lack of clarity indicates a gap in meeting the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming which fields in the intake form are designated as required versus optional.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add explicit field requirement documentation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide a detailed list of fields in the intake form, specifying which are required and which are optional.
